title: Senior/ Site Engineer (Maincon/ Good package)
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Oversee and ensure the smooth execution of construction projects from start to finish.
  • Coordinate with architects, contractors, and other stakeholders to ensure compliance with project specifications and schedules.
  • Utilize JavaScript and related technologies to develop project management tools and dashboards for real-time progress tracking.
  • Conduct site inspections and ensure adherence to safety regulations and quality standards.
  • Prepare technical reports and documentation for project updates and stakeholder presentations.
  • Assist in problem-solving and decision-making processes on site to maintain project timelines.
  • Collaborate with different departments to streamline processes and enhance communication.

Requirements:

  • Degree in Civil Engineering, Building Engineering, or other building-related disciplines.
  • 2-7 years of experience in building and construction projects.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
  • Ability to work well under pressure and manage multiple tasks.

If interested, please submit your application to cvs@jdawms.com with your expected salary and resume.

We regret that only short-listed candidates will be contacted shortly. By submitting your application or resume, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and sharing of your personal information with potential employers for their assessment.

JDA WMS Pte Ltd | EA Personnel: Pham Thi Tuyet Mai 

EA License No: 23S1595 | EA Registration No: R25127838
